name: Marble and Granite Calculator
seo_description: Calculate marble or granite slabs, weight and adhesive needed. Free natural stone calculator.
example_label: Calculatete granite slabs of 2cm thickness for 20m² of area.

range_hints.area: Area to cover with natural stone

result_context: For {area} m² at {thickness_cm}cm: {peso_total_kg} kg of stone, {adhesive_kg} kg of adhesive.
formula_display: Weight = Area x Thickness_m x Density; Total m² = Area x 1.10 (waste)
steps: Calculatete adhesive: 20m² x 4 kg/m² = 80 kg of flexible adhesive
mistakes: Not sellar The mármol (es poroso and mancha fácilmente)
Use adhesive common in lugar of adhesive flexible to piedra
Not Verify que The estructura soporte The weight (piedra es muy pesada)
description: Marble and Granite Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
